calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition To Close Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Petitioner.

Mr. Bresler informed the Court that he filed the petition for Final Distribution and that the hearing was set for May 5, 2008. The Court took the matter off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Belen.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition To Close Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To Mar-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Peter Bresler for Petitioner: Robert Bernek.

The Court advised Mr. Bresler to file the corrected inventory and apprisal and to file a new petition to close the estate. Mr. Bresler stated that he made a mistake and that he would re-file the Petition within a week. The matter was put over to March 26, 2008 for status on filing of the Petition to close the estate.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: C. Casey CSR#8098. Bailiff: R. Harris. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. PETER BRESLER FOR THE PETITIONER;

THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR AND INSTRUCTED MR. BRESLER TO REFILE THE PETITION. THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM PERIOD HAS NOT YET EXPIRED. COUNSEL WAS INSTRUCTED TO GET HEARING DATE FROM CHRISTINE NAHNSEN AFTER FEBRUARY 5, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722 Clerk: Cynthia Herbert. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.
